rationale: Guidance specifies concrete acceptance criteria with Given/When/Then format for signup, login, and password recovery flows. Adds measurable security requirements (bcrypt cost ≥12, 5 failed attempts lockout, TLS 1.2+), performance targets (<200ms auth response), and reliability requirements (99.9% uptime). Replaces vague terms like 'secure' and 'good' with specific technical controls and metrics.
